test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_validation_error
test_cases.description: Reject author creation when name is missing

test_cases.name: create_author_born_year_out_of_range
test_cases.description: Reject author with born_year greater than 2026

test_cases.name: get_author_returns_etag_header
test_cases.description: Verify GET author detail returns ETag header

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_returns_304
test_cases.description: Return 304 Not Modified when ETag matches via If-None-Match header

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Return 404 when author does not exist

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_success
test_cases.description: Update author when If-Match ETag is valid

test_cases.name: update_author_with_stale_etag_returns_412
test_cases.description: Return 412 Precondition Failed when If-Match ETag is stale

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Prevent deletion of author with associated non-deleted books

test_cases.name: create_category_with_unique_name
test_cases.description: Create category with unique name

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name_returns_409
test_cases.description: Reject category creation with duplicate name

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_isbn_and_price
test_cases.description: Create book with valid ISBN (10-13 chars) and non-negative price

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_returns_409
test_cases.description: Reject book creation with duplicate ISBN

test_cases.name: create_book_isbn_too_short_returns_422
test_cases.description: Reject book with ISBN shorter than 10 characters

test_cases.name: create_book_negative_price_returns_422
test_cases.description: Reject book with negative price

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Return 410 Gone when accessing soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_sets_is_deleted_flag
test_cases.description: Soft delete book by setting is_deleted flag

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Return 400 when attempting to restore non-deleted book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_success
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Reject discount on book published within last year

test_cases.name: increase_stock_with_positive_quantity
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity delta

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero_returns_400
test_cases.description: Reject stock update that would result in negative stock

test_cases.name: upload_cover_with_valid_jpeg
test_cases.description: Upload valid JPEG cover image

test_cases.name: upload_cover_with_unsupported_type_returns_415
test_cases.description: Reject cover upload with unsupported file type

test_cases.name: upload_cover_exceeding_size_limit_returns_413
test_cases.description: Reject cover upload exceeding 2 MB size limit

test_cases.name: create_tag_with_unique_name
test_cases.description: Create tag with unique name

test_cases.name: create_tag_duplicate_name_returns_409
test_cases.description: Reject tag creation with duplicate name

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_idempotent
test_cases.description: Adding same tag twice should be idempotent
